body:
Closes #587 

There's a new GitHub label now "Run benchmarks". When this label is activated, the standard benchmark is run for the given PR.

Closes #637 
Closes #639

labels.description: Add this label to run benchmarks on clima
labels.name: Run benchmarks

title: Add benchmark pipeline
